# Veterans Residential Services of Wilson - Website Project

This is a React.js website for a non-profit organization serving veterans in Wilson. The project includes multiple pages, responsive design, and professional styling.

## Project Overview
- **Type**: React.js Website (Vite)
- **Organization**: Veterans Residential Services of Wilson
- **Pages**: Home, About, Services, Contact, Testimonials
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **State Management**: React Context API

## Development

### Install Dependencies
```bash
npm install
```

### Start Development Server
```bash
npm run dev
```

### Build for Production
```bash
npm run build
```

### Preview Production Build
```bash
npm run preview
```

## Project Structure
```
src/
├── components/        # Reusable React components
├── pages/            # Page components (Home, About, Services, Contact, Testimonials)
├── assets/           # Images, logos, and static files
├── styles/           # Tailwind CSS and global styles
├── App.jsx           # Main app component with routing
└── main.jsx          # Entry point
public/               # Static assets
```

## Customization Notes
- Replace placeholder content with actual organization information
- Update organization logo and images in the assets folder
- Customize color scheme if needed (currently uses professional blue tones)
- Update contact information and social media links
- Add actual service descriptions and testimonials
